case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. KHOSRO YAMINI et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED MAY-30-2002, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT YAMINI, KHOSRO DBA B-Z COMPLETE AUTO REPAIR

FOR ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION AND THAT REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED, FOR SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR AUG-20-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-02-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-23-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT YAMINI, KHOSRO DBA B-Z COMPLETE AUTO REPAIR DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-23-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-24-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-26-2002

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $134.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT YAMINI, KHOSRO DBA B-Z COMPLETE AUTO REPAIR

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT RE EQUIPMENT VALUATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAMINI, KHOSRO DBA B-Z COMPLETE AUTO REPAIR POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: TWO BEND-PAK LIFTS, MODEL # PR-10ACX MARKET VALUE $ 2,000.00, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $221.11, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $4,876.64 DAMAGES, $825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $134.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,835.64, $ 221. IS THE INTEREST , SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
